title: MiniMOTD Reforged
body:
## About
MiniMOTD Reforged is an unofficial port of [MiniMOTD](https://modrinth.com/plugin/minimotd), which is a server motd customization mod, with the same usage as the official version.


## Compatibility 
Only compitable with vanilla forge servers. 

If you are hosting a forge+bukkit hybrid server, such as CatServer, Magma, Mohist and Arclight, you should install the offical [MiniMOTD bukkit plugin](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/minimotd-server-list-motd-plugin-with-rgb-gradients.81254/).

## Issues and Feature Requests.
Please click the "Issues" link on this page to report issues or propose new features.

DO NOT report to the official MiniMOTD Github!

## Useful Links
- [Official Wiki](https://github.com/jpenilla/MiniMOTD/wiki)
- [MiniMessage Documentation](https://docs.advntr.dev/minimessage/format.html)
- [MiniMessage Editor Online](https://webui.advntr.dev/)
